/usr/bin/cc  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_uart_driver_determinism.dir/test_uart_driver_determinism.c.o CMakeFiles/test_uart_driver_determinism.dir/mocks/Mockstm32f4xx_hal.c.o CMakeFiles/test_uart_driver_determinism.dir/__/src/uart_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/test_uart_driver_determinism.dir/__/src/uart_deterministic_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/test_uart_driver_determinism.dir/__/src/uart_rtos_adapter.c.o -o test_uart_driver_determinism  libtest_unity.a
